arts.ttl: Juventus Confident of Signing Kolo Muani
arts.sum: Juventus are increasingly optimistic about securing the services of Randal Kolo Muani, the Paris Saint-Germain striker. The Italian club is in the midst of negotiations with PSG, and recent developments suggest that Kolo Muani is leaning towards a move to Juventus.
